settings.heading: Chalet season starts now.
settings.text: Part pickleball, part spikeball, all addictive. The 360° paddle game taking over Kuwait's chalets, beaches and backyards — now in stock at Hafeez.

settings.heading: Everything you need to rally
settings.text: One box, two minutes of setup, and the whole chalet is hooked. Pickleball-style paddles, a 360° net base and the official PaddleSmash balls.

settings.heading: Set up the net
settings.text: Pop the 360° net base open and slot the poles in. No tools, no court — driveway, chalet or sand.

settings.heading: Serve & rally
settings.text: Grab a paddle and serve over the net. Bump, set and smash the ball around the 360° net to your opponents.

settings.heading: Win the point
settings.text: If they can't return it, you score. First to 11 takes it — then run it back, all summer long.

settings.heading: Beach. Chalet. Backyard.
settings.text: Its portability is the whole point — pack it in the car and turn any patch of sand or grass into the most competitive game of the day.

settings.heading: Fast, social, endlessly replayable
settings.text: The best bits of pickleball and roundnet in one game everyone can pick up. Two-on-two or one-on-one, the rematches never stop.

settings.quote: Got the set for our chalet weekend — everyone was obsessed within minutes. Delivered next day in Kuwait City.
settings.author: Yousef · Kuwait City

settings.quote: Like spikeball and pickleball had a baby. Packs into the boot and comes out at every beach day now.
settings.author: Dana · Salmiya

settings.quote: Easy to learn, impossible to stop. The kids and the adults both fight over it. Worth every fils.
settings.author: Abdullah · Hawally

settings.heading: Don't be the only chalet without one
settings.text: The Complete Set ships across the GCC and packs down to travel. Get yours before the weekend.
